name: Easy"no-bake" Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar and butter. Stir until well mixed.
2. Add evaporated milk, cocoa, vanilla extract, salt, and peanut butter to the mixture. Stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add dry oatmeal to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are combined.
4. Line a baking sheet with wax paper.
5. Using a spoon, scoop small portions of the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Allow the no-bake cookies to cool completely before serving or storing in an airtight container.
